diagrams.title: Function Mapping - Domain to Codomain
diagrams.description: Shows how elements from domain map to codomain, illustrating range as subset of codomain
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the relationship between domain, codomain, and range

diagrams.title: One-to-One (Injective) Function
diagrams.description: Each element in domain maps to unique element in codomain, no sharing
elements: No two arrows to same codomain element

diagrams.title: Onto (Surjective) Function
diagrams.description: Every element in codomain is hit by at least one arrow from domain
elements: Every codomain element has at least one incoming arrow
Some domain elements may map to same codomain

diagrams.title: Bijective Function
diagrams.description: Perfect one-to-one correspondence between domain and codomain
elements: Each domain element maps to unique codomain element
Every codomain element is used exactly once
diagrams.purpose: Understand bijective property and inverse possibility

diagrams.title: Horizontal Line Test
diagrams.description: Visual test for one-to-one property using horizontal lines
